data.body: Done on epic branch (commit cd6b375c). 14 op contract schemas + register_step annotations for the 7 remaining ops; CONTRACT_SCHEMAS now covers all 8 ops. Tests: registry-coverage guard, 2020-12 resolution, negative-input rejection (gate enum/required tag+fields/additionalProperties), per-op output-shape validation (pure ops in unit tier, store ops in store tier). 241 workflow tests + 45 contract/store tests green.
